name: Filling (for Ring of Coconut Fudge Cake)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup semisweet chocolate chips or milk chocolate chips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, beat together the sugar and vanilla extract until smooth.
2. Add the cream cheese and egg to the mixture and continue beating until combined.
3. Stir in the flaked coconut and chocolate chips until evenly distributed.
